hooks.command:
# Prevent editing on main branch
[ "$(git branch --show-current)" != "main" ] || { echo '{"block": true, "message": "Cannot edit files on main branch. Create a feature branch first."}' >&2; exit 2; }

# Enforce uv over pip
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -qE '\bpip3?\s+install\b'; then
  echo '{"block": true, "message": "Use `uv add <package>` instead of pip install. This project uses uv for dependency management."}' >&2
  exit 2
fi
exit 0

# Auto-format Python files with ruff
if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.py$ ]]; then
  file_path="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH}"
  ruff format "$file_path" 2>&1
  ruff check --fix --select I "$file_path" 2>&1
  exit_code=$?
  if [ $exit_code -ne 0 ]; then
    echo '{"feedback": "Formatting failed. Check file for syntax errors."}' >&2
    exit 1
  else
    echo '{"feedback": "Formatted with ruff.", "suppressOutput": true}'
  fi
fi

# Auto-run related tests when test files change
if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ test_.*\.py$ ]] || [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ _test\.py$ ]]; then
  echo '{"feedback": "Running tests..."}' >&2
  pytest "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH}" -x --tb=short --no-header -q 2>&1 | tail -30
  exit_code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
  if [ $exit_code -eq 0 ]; then
    echo '{"feedback": "Tests passed."}'
  else
    echo '{"feedback": "Tests failed. See output above."}' >&2
  fi
fi

# Lint Python files with ruff (non-blocking)
if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.py$ ]]; then
  echo '{"feedback": "Checking lint..."}' >&2
  output=$(ruff check "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH}" 2>&1)
  exit_code=$?
  if [ $exit_code -eq 0 ]; then
    echo '{"feedback": "No lint issues.", "suppressOutput": true}'
  else
    errors=$(echo "$output" | head -20)
    if [ -n "$errors" ]; then
      echo '{"feedback": "Ruff found issues:"}' >&2
      echo "$errors" >&2
    fi
  fi
  exit 0
fi

# Warn if editing files in data/ or results/ directories
if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ /data/ ]] || [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ /results/ ]]; then
  echo '{"feedback": "Warning: Editing files in data/ or results/ — these should typically be generated, not hand-edited."}' >&2
fi
exit 0
